technology_gate.input: compiler-emitted HIR RMSNorm op plus runtime shape/workload distribution
technology_gate.decision: profile-guided kernel selection among CUDA/Triton/PyTorch candidates by shape bucket
technology_gate.metric: kernel p95 latency, effective bandwidth, TPOT projection, throughput projection

serving_impact.method: single-op p95 latency delta projected onto decode TPOT proxy
serving_impact.note: This is a serving-level projection from kernel p95 evidence; full serving validation should replay the selected kernel in the decode path.

remaining_work: Replay selected RMSNorm kernel inside a full decode loop instead of projecting from per-kernel p95 latency.
Add fp16/bf16 candidate rows and vectorized CUDA candidate when kernels are implemented.
Attach real Nsight Compute occupancy/DRAM/stall metrics when ncu capture is available.
